overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works approved all items on the agenda, including recommendations for real estate services qualifications for two state highway projects, a pay estimate for lead service line replacement, and contractor licenses. The board also approved a $2,338.87 subrogated insurance claim for American Family Insurance on behalf of Kara Blank following closed session deliberation.

agenda.item: April 14, 2026 Regular Board of Public Works Minutes
Make recommendation for Statement of Qualifications for Real Estate Services, STH 52 (East Wausau Avenue) Project ID 6999-00-23
Make recommendation for Statement of Qualifications for Real Estate Services, Bus. 51 (Grand Avenue) Project ID 6999-02-20
Pay Estimate #26 with Community Infrastructure Partners for replacement of lead service lines
Portland Cement Concrete License: Potrykus Construction, LLC and Miron Construction Co., Inc.
Bituminous Concrete Paving License: Miron Construction Co., Inc.
Closed Session pursuant to Wisconsin State Statute §19.85(1)(g) for deliberating on claims
Reconvene into Open Session to take action on Closed Session items

discussions.item: April 14, 2026 Regular Board of Public Works Minutes
discussions.body: Approved. The board passed the minutes from the previous meeting.

discussions.item: Statement of Qualifications for Real Estate Services, STH 52 (East Wausau Avenue) Project ID 6999-00-23
discussions.body: Approved. The board recommended approval of the statement of qualifications for real estate services for this state highway project. Qualifications were opened on April 14, 2026.

discussions.item: Statement of Qualifications for Real Estate Services, Bus. 51 (Grand Avenue) Project ID 6999-02-20
discussions.body: Approved. The board recommended approval of the statement of qualifications for real estate services for the Business 51 Grand Avenue project. Qualifications were opened on April 14, 2026.

discussions.item: Pay Estimate #26 with Community Infrastructure Partners for replacement of lead service lines
discussions.body: Approved. The board approved the pay estimate for ongoing lead service line replacement work with Community Infrastructure Partners.

discussions.item: Portland Cement Concrete License: Potrykus Construction, LLC and Miron Construction Co., Inc.
discussions.body: Approved. The board granted Portland Cement Concrete licenses to both Potrykus Construction, LLC and Miron Construction Co., Inc.

discussions.item: Bituminous Concrete Paving License: Miron Construction Co., Inc.
discussions.body: Approved. The board granted a Bituminous Concrete Paving license to Miron Construction Co., Inc.

discussions.item: Closed Session for deliberating on claims
discussions.body: Approved. The board entered closed session pursuant to Wisconsin State Statute §19.85(1)(g) to deliberate on claims.

discussions.item: Reconvene into Open Session and action on Closed Session items
discussions.body: Approved 3-0. The board reconvened into open session and approved the American Family Insurance subrogated claim on behalf of Kara Blank in the amount of $2,338.87. Motion moved by Vincent Bonino, seconded by MaryAnne Groat. Eric Lindman, MaryAnne Groat, and Vincent Bonino all voted yes.

actionItems: Recommendation for real estate services qualifications for STH 52 project forwarded for approval
Recommendation for real estate services qualifications for Bus. 51 project forwarded for approval
Pay Estimate #26 for lead service line replacement approved for payment
Portland Cement Concrete licenses issued to Potrykus Construction, LLC and Miron Construction Co., Inc.
Bituminous Concrete Paving license issued to Miron Construction Co., Inc.
American Family Insurance subrogated claim of $2,338.87 on behalf of Kara Blank approved for payment
title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting Pt.1 - 4/21/26
